mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (user_id, category, title, p_content) VALUES (#{userId}, #{category}, #{title}, #{pContent})
mapper.select: SELECT post_id, user_id, category, title, p_content FROM posts WHERE category = #{category} AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY post_id DESC
